title: Pieter Spronck
text: Home * People * Pieter Spronck Pieter Spronck [1] Pieter Hubert Marie Spronck , a Dutch computer scientist and associate professor at Tilburg Centre for Creative Computing (TiCC) of Tilburg University . He graduated from Delft University of Technology in 1996, and was affiliated with the Maastricht University , where he received his Ph.D. thesis in 2005 titled Adaptive Game AI [2] . His research interests include evolutionary systems , adaptive control , multi-agent systems , knowledge technology and machine learning for commercial game AI [3] .
